scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./build/client --project-name=multi-store-saas
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute multi-store-saas-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute multi-store-saas-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0002_seed_data.sql && wrangler d1 execute multi-store-saas-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0003_hybrid_mode.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute multi-store-saas-db --file=./db/migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute multi-store-saas-db --file=./db/migrations/0002_seed_data.sql && wrangler d1 execute multi-store-saas-db --file=./db/migrations/0003_hybrid_mode.sql
